topic: Pretrained language models as feature extractors
key_concepts: Leveraging massive, pre-trained neural networks for text representation.
The concept of using a deep learning model strictly to transform data, not to predict the final target.
Freezing the model weights to maintain extraction stability.
Pipeline efficiency: raw text in, high-quality dense features out.

definitions.definition: Model neural network besar yang telah dilatih dengan jutaan dokumen teks untuk memahami struktur bahasa.
Penggunaan model tanpa memperbarui bobot internalnya, hanya memanfaatkan lapisan output untuk mengambil representasi fitur.

examples: Passing a text corpus through a frozen BERT model to obtain 768-dimensional vectors, which are then fed into a standard SVM or logistic regression classifier.

relations.prerequisites: Sentence and contextual embeddings from s04.
relations.builds_toward: The extraction vs fine-tuning trade-off in s06.

exclusions: Pretraining objectives (Masked Language Modeling, Next Sentence Prediction).
